claims.summary: Fallback texture terms are lived resistance vocabulary and must stay visible under high entropy.
Fallback texture language should scale with pressure and density-gradient evidence, especially around pressure risk above 0.20.
Comparing MLX 12B voice depth against smaller Ollama fallback at high entropy is a runtime/model fidelity probe, not permission to alter providers silently.
claims.rationale: Recorded as a sandbox/runtime-observation follow-up. No fallback model, sampler, provider, or live voice contract was changed in this run.
